entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0204.10704] The concept us-gaap:FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsNet with a value of 403,383 has been used with the axis PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis and the member us-gaap:SoftwareAndSoftwareDevelopmentCostsMember. The concept us-gaap:FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsNet should be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis or the IndefiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis. Alternatively a different concept should be used to represent a line item associated with PPE.
Concept : us-gaap:FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsNet Value : 403,383 Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis=us-gaap:SoftwareAndSoftwareDevelopmentCostsMember
Rule Element Id:10704 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - duos_s1.htm 7895

[DQC.US.0204.10704] The concept us-gaap:FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsAmortizationExpenseNextTwelveMonths with a value of 246,676 has been used with the axis PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis and the member us-gaap:SoftwareAndSoftwareDevelopmentCostsMember. The concept us-gaap:FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsAmortizationExpenseNextTwelveMonths should be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis or the IndefiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis. Alternatively a different concept should be used to represent a line item associated with PPE.
